shortAnswer: Anti-CCP antibodies are a more specific indicator of rheumatoid arthritis than rheumatoid factor and can sometimes be detected even before joint symptoms appear. A positive value should be assessed by a doctor together with symptoms and other findings.
metaDescription: Anti-CCP antibodies elevated? Meaning for rheumatoid arthritis explained simply.
causesElevated: Increased risk of developing rheumatoid arthritis
doctorQuestions: How certain does this value confirm rheumatoid arthritis?
Should I be referred to a rheumatologist?
